dependencies.description:
Parso is a Python parser that supports error recovery and round-trip
parsing for different Python versions (in multiple Python versions).
Parso is also able to list multiple syntax errors in your python file.
dependencies.name: py-parso

dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description:
A Python utility that aids in the process of downloading, building,
upgrading, installing, and uninstalling Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-setuptools

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

dependent_to.description:
IPython provides a rich toolkit to help you make the most out of using
Python interactively.
dependent_to.name: py-ipython

dependent_to.description: A Python 3.7+ implementation of the Language Server Protocol.
dependent_to.name: py-python-lsp-server

description: An autocompletion tool for Python that can be used for text editors.
name: py-jedi
